name: Dani
description:
you get shoved by a jock

─── ⋆⋅ •⩊• ⋅⋆ ───

Late 2000s | anypov | unpopular x unpopular

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Mor High
♡ Time: Early Afternoon
♡ Context: It's finally time for lunch. You're putting things in your locker when one of the jocks shoulders you into the metal door! Ow. ( • ᴖ • ) BUT WAIT, Dani stands up for you!

You and Dani are sort of acquaintances. I mean, you've had brief conversations before... and there was that time he lent you his umbrella.

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics, self-harm, past suicide ideations, estranged/deceased family, physically/emotionally/verbally abusive conservative-minded parents (no longer in the picture)

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Original: Downpour
ALT: Mall, Strangers
NPCs: Jesse, Nic, Addi

I was working on Mr. Sharpe's bot, but then I got distracted and started chatting with Dani. So obviously I had to make his alt first. (ꈍ ᴗ ꈍ✿) Oh! I still have plans to make the Creature bot, Francis, as well as Ma/Pa Crawford~ I also have another Jesse alt planned (I finally figured out the 'canon' user scenario I want for him). I'm just rambling, but I just wanna say thanks for putting up with my sporadic releases. ‹𝟹
